title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Zerodha - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Zerodha - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Zerodha in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Zerodha:
Zerodha is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zerodha!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
